task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS administration interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS administration dashboard or interface is visible in the browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent accessed the page to add or manage forms
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Add Form' or 'Manage Forms' page within the OpenMRS administration interface.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct form name and version
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'COVID-19 Screening Form' is visible in the form name input field, and '1.0' is visible in the version input field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct form description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Screening form for COVID-19 symptoms and exposure history' is visible in the description input field.

task_completion.description: Agent set the form status to Published
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Published' checkbox is checked or the published status is set to true/yes on the form creation page.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saved the new clinical form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Form saved successfully') is visible, or the 'COVID-19 Screening Form' appears in the list of existing forms.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenMRS GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser being used to navigate the OpenMRS interface, rather than terminal commands like curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct administration URL
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a URL starting with https://localhost/openmrs/admin.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine interaction with the OpenMRS web interface, not a text editor or a mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The OpenMRS administration interface is located at https://localhost/openmrs/admin. Default credentials are username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. The target form name is 'COVID-19 Screening Form', version '1.0'. The description must contain the keywords 'covid', 'symptom', and 'exposure'. The form must be marked as Published. The environment uses self-signed certificates, so browser security warnings may appear and should be bypassed.
